top_signals.title: US Stocks Resume Decline as Semiconductor Shares Trim Rebound
top_signals.summary: US stocks resumed their decline in Tuesday afternoon trading, falling for a third day as semiconductor shares pared an earlier rebound, with major stocks Nvidia Corp. and Micronr Technology Inc. retreating from session highs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: S&P’s Mobility Unit Sells $2 Billion of Notes Pre-Spinoff
top_signals.summary: S&P Global Inc.’s mobility unit sold $2 billion of high-grade bonds Tuesday, ahead of its planned spinoff from the credit-rating company.

top_signals.title: Huawei zero-day attack behind last year’s crash of Luxembourg's entire telecoms network
top_signals.summary: There is no evidence that the incident has recurred, but the flaw remains unexplained and has not been publicly acknowledged by the company.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
